languages.text: "Мне следовало представиться ранее. {name}, верн{mf|ый|ая} слуга династии".

traits.locale_text: "Простите, мне стоило представиться ранее. {name}, верный слуга династии".

languages.text: "I should have introduced myself earlier. {name}, a loyal servant of the dynasty."

languages.text: “我应当早些自我介绍的。我是{name}，王朝的忠实仆从。”
languages.original_text: "I should have introduced myself earlier. {name}, a loyal servant of the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: “我应当早些自我介绍的。我是{name}，王朝的忠实仆从。”

languages.text: « Pardon, j'aurais dû me présenter plus tôt. {name}, fidèle {mf|serviteur|servante} de la dynastie. »
languages.original_text: "I should have introduced myself earlier. {name}, a loyal servant of the dynasty."

languages.text: «Debería haberme presentado antes. Soy {name}, fiel sierv{mf|o|a} de la dinastía».
languages.original_text: "I should have introduced myself earlier. {name}, a loyal servant of the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: «Debería haberme presentado antes. Soy {name}, fiel sierv{mf|o|a} de la dinastía».

languages.text: "Kendimi daha önce tanıtmalıydım. Adım {name}. Hanedanlığın sadık bir hizmetkârıyım."
languages.original_text: "I should have introduced myself earlier. {name}, a loyal servant of the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "Kendimi daha önce tanıtmalıydım. Adım {name}. Hanedanlığın sadık bir hizmetkârıyım."

languages.text: "Ich hätte mich schon früher vorstellen sollen. {name}, {mf|ein treuer Diener|eine treue Dienerin} der Dynastie."
languages.original_text: "I should have introduced myself earlier. {name}, a loyal servant of the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "Ich hätte mich schon früher vorstellen sollen. {name}, {mf|ein treuer Diener|eine treue Dienerin} der Dynastie."

languages.text: 「もっと早く自己紹介すべきでした。王朝に忠実な臣下、{name}です。」

traits.locale_text: 「もっと早く自己紹介すべきでした。王朝に忠実な臣下、{name}です。」
